mapper.select: SELECT oid, uid, recv_name, recv_phone, recv_province, recv_city, recv_area, recv_address, total_price, status, order_time, pay_time, created_user, created_time, modified_user, modified_time FROM t_order WHERE uid = #{uid} ORDER BY oid DESC
SELECT oid, uid, recv_name, recv_phone, recv_province, recv_city, recv_area, recv_address, total_price, status, order_time, pay_time FROM t_order WHERE oid = #{oid}
